description: A square graphic styled as an instant photo taped to a dark brick wall. The framed photograph shows a balding adult man with a gray beard in a green top with a lanyard, looking at the camera. Handwritten-style caption under the photo reads CONSPIRACY TO DISTRIBUTE HEROIN. Lower text reads Worst of the Worst with a red Newark tag and an ICE wordmark with seal at the bottom.
notable_text: CONSPIRACY TO DISTRIBUTE HEROIN; Worst of the Worst; Newark; ICE
